children.blockName: FAQ · Can I switch plans later

children.innerHTML: Anytime. Upgrades apply immediately and downgrades at the end of your billing cycle — no proration puzzles.

children.blockName: FAQ · What counts as a teammat

children.innerHTML: Anyone who posts or reacts. Read-only stakeholders are free on every plan, forever.
Nonprofits, open-source teams, and classrooms get Pro at 50% off. Write to us from your org email.

children.blockName: FAQ · How does the free trial

children.innerHTML: How does the free trial work?
Fourteen days of Pro, no card required. When it ends you drop to Starter — nothing gets deleted.
Try the calm version of fast.
Five minutes to set up. One week to feel it.

meta_description: Simple pricing that scales — every Relay plan starts free.
name: relay_pricing
